correct_code:
def simple_interest(principal, rate, time):
    return (principal * rate * time) / 100
buggy_code:
def simple_interest(principal, rate, time):
    return None
test_code:
assert simple_interest(1000, 5, 2) == 100.0
assert simple_interest(500, 10, 1) == 50.0
assert simple_interest(200, 5, 3) == 30.0
